description: grep on empty files exits 1 under pipefail, causing script abort. Fix: check -s before grep, add || true

pattern: eval() for dynamic filtering is an anti-pattern
description: Never use eval to build filter commands from user input. Use jq --arg for safe JSON filtering or awk -v for safe text processing.
test functions that return 1 on failure abort the entire suite under set -e. Test runners need || true on individual test calls or set +e in the runner.
New features that add cost/complexity should be disabled by default with opt-in config. Prevents surprise behavior changes for existing users.
